title: Operate and maintain irrigation pumping systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate and maintain irrigation pumping systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to maintain pumps

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret work requirements for the satisfactory completion of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret work requirements for the satisfactory completion of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret work requirements for the satisfactory completion of operations.

pcs.text: Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use required materials, tools, equipment and machinery and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain safety and personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify and arrange support required for the safe completion of the servicing and maintenance tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and arrange support required for the safe completion of the servicing and maintenance tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and arrange support required for the safe completion of the servicing and maintenance tasks.

pcs.text: Carry out isolation and lock-out of all equipment necessary for the safe execution of tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out isolation and lock-out of all equipment necessary for the safe execution of tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out isolation and lock-out of all equipment necessary for the safe execution of tasks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to maintain pumps

elements.title: Carry out pump maintenance

pcs.text: Inspect pumps and report any faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect pumps and report any faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect pumps and report any faults.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot pump system and rectify cause of faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot pump system and rectify cause of faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot pump system and rectify cause of faults.

pcs.text: Adjust and set pressure switches and air tanks to suit pump performance and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust and set pressure switches and air tanks to suit pump performance and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust and set pressure switches and air tanks to suit pump performance and site conditions.

pcs.text: Service and maintain pumps according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service and maintain pumps according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service and maintain pumps according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain servicing and maintenance records according to servicing and maintenance recording procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain servicing and maintenance records according to servicing and maintenance recording procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain servicing and maintenance records according to servicing and maintenance recording procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out pump maintenance

elements.title: Prepare the pumping system

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check operation and function of pump and driver?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check operation and function of pump and driver.

pcs.text: Conduct pumping system pre-start-up checks according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pumping system pre-start-up checks according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pumping system pre-start-up checks according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Ensure pumping system valves are correctly sequenced and filters are clear before commencing pumping operations, and safety requirements are met
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure pumping system valves are correctly sequenced and filters are clear before commencing pumping operations, and safety requirements are met?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure pumping system valves are correctly sequenced and filters are clear before commencing pumping operations, and safety requirements are met.

elements.title: Start up and shutdown pumping system

pcs.text: Operate ancillary equipment using safe practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate ancillary equipment using safe practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate ancillary equipment using safe practices.

pcs.text: Start up and shut down pump according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start up and shut down pump according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start up and shut down pump according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Implement emergency shutdown procedures when required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement emergency shutdown procedures when required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement emergency shutdown procedures when required.

elements.title: Operate and monitor pumping and ancillary systems

pcs.text: Check and maintain flanges, gaskets and seals within operational tolerances to avoid environmental damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and maintain flanges, gaskets and seals within operational tolerances to avoid environmental damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and maintain flanges, gaskets and seals within operational tolerances to avoid environmental damage.

pcs.text: Monitor pump pressures and flows for conformance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pump pressures and flows for conformance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pump pressures and flows for conformance.

pcs.text: Use amperage testing equipment to monitor and identify variations in pumping systems and equipment operating conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use amperage testing equipment to monitor and identify variations in pumping systems and equipment operating conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use amperage testing equipment to monitor and identify variations in pumping systems and equipment operating conditions.

pcs.text: Monitor pumping systems, equipment and component performance for signs of excessive wear or reduction of performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pumping systems, equipment and component performance for signs of excessive wear or reduction of performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pumping systems, equipment and component performance for signs of excessive wear or reduction of performance.

pcs.text: Check operational valves and valve assemblies for leaks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check operational valves and valve assemblies for leaks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check operational valves and valve assemblies for leaks.

pcs.text: Check and clean filter systems periodically and remove any potential blockages or impurities entering the pumping system or equipment which may cause cavitation or malfunction during operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and clean filter systems periodically and remove any potential blockages or impurities entering the pumping system or equipment which may cause cavitation or malfunction during operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and clean filter systems periodically and remove any potential blockages or impurities entering the pumping system or equipment which may cause cavitation or malfunction during operation.

pcs.text: Inspect and sample lubrication oil to ensure operating levels are correct and to determine if any contamination has taken place which may affect the operational capacity of the pumping system and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and sample lubrication oil to ensure operating levels are correct and to determine if any contamination has taken place which may affect the operational capacity of the pumping system and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and sample lubrication oil to ensure operating levels are correct and to determine if any contamination has taken place which may affect the operational capacity of the pumping system and equipment.

pcs.text: Take appropriate action resulting from checks and monitoring
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take appropriate action resulting from checks and monitoring?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take appropriate action resulting from checks and monitoring.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Operate and monitor pumping and ancillary systems

elements.title: Shut down the pumping system

pcs.text: Shut down injection equipment and pump according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shut down injection equipment and pump according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down injection equipment and pump according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Clean pumping equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean pumping equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean pumping equipment.

pcs.text: Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste generated by both the pumping process and cleaning procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste generated by both the pumping process and cleaning procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, treat and dispose of or recycle waste generated by both the pumping process and cleaning procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Shut down the pumping system
